gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/334)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرفوع - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/334)
text: ذُكِرَ عِنْدَ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) النِّسَاءُ فَقَالَ لَا تُشَاوِرُوهُنَّ فِي النَّجْوَى وَ لَا تُطِيعُوهُنَّ فِي ذِي قَرَابَةٍ .

en.hubeali: And from him, from his father,

(It has been narrated) raising it to Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘The women were mentioned in the presence of Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do not consult them in the secret counsels, nor obey them among the near relatives’.
en.sarwar: 6. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from his father in a marfu’ manner who has said the following: “Once women were mentioned before abu Ja’far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and he (the Imam) said, ‘You must not ask for their advice in private (secret) matters and you must not listen to them in the issues about the relatives.’”
